title: Thai Stir Fried Eggplant
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired stir fry made with eggplant and various vegetables.

ingredients.name: Thai Red Chili
ingredients.notes: depending on your desired level of spiciness

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the eggplant and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chilies, garlic, and ginger, and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the basil and cook until fragrant.
Add the fry and stir to combine.
Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
